---
name: Data Quality Issue
about: Report a data entry error, missing record, or QC flag requiring review
labels: data-quality
assignees: ''
---

## Participant ID
<!-- Format: NANO-XXXX (e.g., NANO-0042). Do NOT use full name or DOB. -->
`NANO-`

## Visit Event
<!-- Select the affected event -->
- [ ] nicu_admission
- [ ] month_1
- [ ] month_2
- [ ] month_3
- [ ] month_6
- [ ] month_9
- [ ] month_12
- [ ] month_24
- [ ] month_36

## Instrument / Form
<!-- REDCap instrument name, e.g., ados2_scores, ecg_recording_log -->

## Variable Name
<!-- REDCap field name, e.g., ados2_css_total -->

## Description of Issue
<!-- Describe the data quality problem clearly -->

## Severity
- [ ] Critical (blocks analysis; participant excluded until resolved)
- [ ] High (incorrect value; must correct before analysis)
- [ ] Medium (inconsistency; flag for PI review)
- [ ] Low (minor; acceptable for current analysis)

## Steps to Reproduce in REDCap
1. Log into REDCap
2. Navigate to record `NANO-XXXX`, event `...`
3. Open form `...`
4. Observe: `...`

## Evidence
<!-- Attach screenshots ONLY if they contain no PHI (no names, DOB, dates).
     Describe what you see if screenshots contain PHI. -->

## Proposed Resolution
<!-- What correction should be made? Who needs to verify? -->

## Assigned To
<!-- Tag the RA or data coordinator responsible for resolution -->
